Title: Neon Cityscape Retro Sunset Resin Phone Grip Decal
Description:
Capture the vibrant essence of a retro cityscape with this stunning resin phone grip decal. Featuring a dynamic neon glow and a captivating sunset backdrop, this design evokes the nostalgic cool of synthwave and vaporwave aesthetics.

  • Vibrant Design: The decal showcases a modern, towering cityscape framed by a dreamy, gradient sunset, utilizing rich purples, blues, and magentas.
  • Premium Material Finish: Designed to look like high-quality resin art, the decal provides a glossy, vibrant surface that will pop against any phone case.
  • Easy Application: Simple peel-and-stick design ensures a clean and straightforward application process.
  • Perfect Gift: Makes an ideal accessory gift for lovers of synthwave, vaporwave, cyberpunk art, or unique home decor.

Elevate your phone's look with a piece of wearable art that captures the energy of a futuristic, neon-lit night.
